rationale: Educ. Code §37.003 governs school placement review committees for student disciplinary matters. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No overlap exists between these provisions.
quote: Each school shall establish a three-member committee to determine placement of a student when a teacher refuses the return of a student to the teacher's class
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns student placement committees, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
